title: Managed Dashboard
description: Easily view and analyse your Observability data using managed dashboards, and set notifications on the Grafana® platform.
description_bis: You can pre-configure the tenants within the Observability service you wish to pull as a data source, and set access permissions for the instance with OVHcloud IAM policies.

onboarding.title: Managed dashboards with the Grafana® platform
onboarding.description: Managed dashboards allow you to view and analyse your Observability data with ease, and set notifications using the Grafana® platform. You can pre-configure the tenants within the Observability service you wish to pull as a data source, and set access permissions for the instance with OVHcloud IAM policies.

creation.title: Create a managed dashboard with the Grafana® platform

edition.title: Edit a managed dashboard with the Grafana® platform

delete.delete_managed_dashboard_description: Are you sure you want to delete the "{{managedDashboard}}" instance?

allowedNetworks.label: Trusted networks
allowedNetworks.helper: List of client IP addresses that have access to the gathering tool (IPv4). Format: 1.2.3.4, 42.42.42.0/24
allowedNetworks.error: Invalid IP address format. Use the IPv4 format: 1.2.3.4 or 42.42.42.0/24
